scene_description: A robotic arm is near an office chair that holds a green tray containing various objects, next to a pair of recycling bins.

candidates.rationale: There are two red/orange apples clearly visible inside the green tray on the chair.

scene_description: Various tools and packaged items are arranged on a small black table, with a cardboard box sitting on the floor below.

candidates.rationale: There is one orange coiled cable and one black coiled cable resting on the right side of the table.
